title: How established SaaS players are reinventing for the AI era
description: Artificial intelligence is rewriting the role software plays inside a business, shifting from passive insights to active participation.
content: “AI is the biggest shift in the history of modern business,” says Paul Robson, CEO of MYOB. “It’s not just changing the way we engage with our customers; it’s changing the way we build and operate our own company as well as the way that SMEs run thei... [4824 chars]

title: EU rules reining in Big Tech will now target cloud services and AI, regulators say
description: BRUSSELS, April 28 (Reuters) - ⁠The European Union plans to turn the focus of its landmark rules curbing the power ⁠of Big Tech to cloud and artificial intelligence services, aiming to promote fairer competition after ‌seeing positive results in other digital areas, EU regulators said.

title: Storage stocks jump as Seagate's upbeat forecast fuels confidence in AI spending
description: Shares of storage companies jumped in extended trading on Tuesday, after strong revenue and profit forecasts from Seagate Technology signaled that spending by enterprises on artificial ​intelligence equipment will remain strong.
content:
Seagate's strong forecast and the late-day surge in ‌storage stocks underscore investors' confidence that enterprise AI spending will sustain demand for data-storage equipment despite broader market concerns about the pace of AI adoption.

title: 11th NCEEITET concludes at GCET Jammu, highlights AI’s role in tourism development
description: Excelsior Correspondent JAMMU, Apr 28: The 11th National Conference and Exhibition on Emerging and Innovative Trends in Engineering Technology (NCEEITET) concluded today at Government College of Engineering and Technology (GCET), Jammu, with a strong focus on the use of Artificial Intelligence (AI) and Machine Learning (ML) in tourism development in Jammu and Kashmir. The two-day conference was organised in technical collaboration with IIT Kharagpur and witnessed participation of academicians, industry experts, policymakers and students from different parts of the country. title: Elon Musk takes stand in trial vs. Sam Altman that could reshape AI’s future
description: Elon Musk, the Tesla CEO, world's richest man and OpenAI cofounder, took the stand Tuesday in a high-stakes trial revolving around a bitter feud with his former friend Sam Altman that could reshape the future development of artificial intelligence.
content:
By BARBARA ORTUTAY
OAKLAND, Calif. (AP) — Elon Musk, the Tesla CEO, world’s richest man and OpenAI cofounder, took the stand Tuesday in a high-stakes trial revolving around a bitter feud with his former friend Sam Altman that could reshape the future... [6016 chars]

title: How a free flow of information can amplify incorrect ideas
description: The idea that information should flow freely is deeply embedded in the design of social media. The assumption is that the more information is produced and shared, the better. However, simulations by a team of scientists including University of Groningen Professor of Artificial Intelligence Davide Grossi show that such an unrestricted flow of information can amplify incorrect ideas among like-minded people. The study is published in Proceedings of the National Academy of Sciences.
